name: Perplexity
description: Registers Perplexity Sonar as a first-party OpenAI-compatible chat provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback Perplexity API key used for model discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Perplexity API key
settings.description: Perplexity API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to PERPLEXITY_API_KEY.

providers.name: Perplexity
providers.description: Refreshes Perplexity Sonar chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
